# floating-action

## Plugin reference

- Description: CSS group-hover floating action that morphs from a collapsed pill to an expanded panel with animated dimensions, background, and shadow.
- Exports (web):
  - Types: `FloatingActionFadeInProps`, `FloatingActionProps`
